name: message-logger
description: Logs all messages to the console for debugging
author: Kiama Team

settings.label: Log Level
settings.description: Controls how much detail is included in each log entry.

settings.label: Include Timestamp
settings.description: Prepend an ISO-8601 timestamp to every log line.

settings.label: Channel Filter
settings.description: Only log messages from this channel ID. Leave blank to log all channels.
